title: add exit code for buildah pull network error
body:
Close #1499

Add different exit code for buildah pull network failures. Check net.Error or defined network error.

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: @QiWang19 What is going on with this PR?

Do I need to keep this open. I can't generate the network error `tls: unexpected message` in the original issue #1499 
If `tls: unexpected message` should be defined for the exit code, will there be other errors we need to define? @TomSweeneyRedHat @rhatdan @vrothberg ?
@QiWang19 ANy chance dropping the network connection while pulling causes this error?

https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1504 since we haven't seen this for a long time, we'll close this PR

@rhatdan and I agreed that we should just close this for now.

I believe this was meant to be about #1499. ie., an exit code other than 1 to represent network failures. The TLS problem reported in #1504 was just an example of such a failure, but it could have been anything really. eg., slow network timing out the pull, broken DNS, etc..
